1000.question: -algia
1000.answer: -algia means pain. For example, neuralgia means nerve pain.

1001.question: -emia
1001.answer: emia means blood condition. For example, anemia means lack of blood or lack or red blood cells.

1002.question: -itis.
1002.answer: -itis means inflammation. For example, arthritis means joint inflammation.

1003.question: -ectomy means surgical removal.
1003.answer: -ectomy means surgical removal. For example, appendectomy means removal of the appendix.

1004.question: -trophy
1004.answer: -trophy means growth or development. For example, hypertrophy means excessive growth.

1005.question: -pathy
1005.answer: -pathy means disease or condition. For example, neuropathy means nerve disease.

1006.question: -uria
1006.answer: uria means urine condition. For example, hematuria means blood in the urine.

1007.question: -stenosis
1007.answer: -stenosis means narrowing or constriction. For example, aortic stenosis means narrowing of the aortic valve.

1008.question: -malacia
1008.answer: -malacia means softening. For example, chondromalacia means softening of cartilage.

1009.question: -pnea
1009.answer: -pnea means breathing condition. For example, apnea means absence of breathing.

1010.question: -ptosis
1010.answer: -ptosis means drooping or falling down. For example, blepharoptosis means drooping of the eyelid.

1011.question: -cele
1011.answer: -cele means a fluid filled sac or hernia. For example, a hydrocele is a fluid filled sac particulrly found on the testicle

1012.question: -rrhea
1012.answer: -rrhea means excessive discharge or flow. For example, rhinorrhea means excessive mucus discharge from the nose.

1013.question: -osis
1013.answer: -osis means abnormal condition or disease. For example, osteoporosis means abnormal bone condition.

1014.question: -megaly
1014.answer: -megaly means enlargement. For example, cardiomegaly means heart enlargement.

1015.question: -oid
1015.answer: -oid means resembling or having the appearance of something. For example, arachnoid refers to a membrane that resembles a spiders web

1016.question: -edema
1016.answer: -edema means swelling or fluid retention. For example, lymphedema means swelling due to lymphatic fluid retention.

1017.question: -phagia
1017.answer: -phagia means eating or swallowing. For example, polyphagia means excessive eating.

1018.question: -phasia
1018.answer: -phasia means speech or language. For example, aphasia means loss of ability to speak or understand speech.

1019.question: -taxia
1019.answer: -taxia means coordination or control of movement. For example, ataxia means lack of coordination.

1020.question: -esthesia
1020.answer: -esthesia means sensation or feeling. For example, anesthesia means absence of sensation.
